case_title: OPORTUN, INC, VS. DIOGENES ADALBERTO VARELA LOPEZ

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC,
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST.
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,080.84 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC, AS TO DEFENDANT VARELA LOPEZ, DIOGENES ADALBERTO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-12-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY NARALLANI SANCHEZ LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT DIOGENES ADALBERTO VARELA LOPEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506).
